new_articles.title: SK Hynix seeks US$29bn with new US listing
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix seeks US$29bn with new US listing'이다. Bringing Taiwan to the World and the World to Taiwan. SK Hynix expects trading on the NASDAQ exchange to start on July 10, a regulatory filing yesterday showed SK Hynix controlled 57 percent of the global HBM market by revenue in the fourth quarter of last year, Counterpoint Research data showed The insatiable demand for memory chips has fueled breakneck rallies in these stocks, with SK Hynix shares listed in Seoul climbing more than 300 percent this year, exceeding US$1 trillion in market value A US listing would give the company access to a fresh pool of investors and could help SK Hynix narrow a gap in its valuation compared with its competitors SK Hynix’s operating profit for the first quarter jumped to 37. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: South Korea’s SK Hynix targets $29-billion U.S. listing
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea’s SK Hynix targets $29-billion U.S. listing'이다. Offering could be the second-biggest share sale after SpaceX’s blockbuster IPO. investors “The most attractive benefit for investors is that SK Hynix will trade on Nasdaq alongside rival Micron, giving the company an opportunity to be re-rated in the U market,” said Ryu Young-ho, a senior analyst at NH Investment & Securities Capacity expansion SK Hynix said the proceeds from the listing of American Depositary Receipts will be used to build chip factories in South Korea and purchase chipmaking equipment such as an extreme ultraviolet scanner made by Dutch equipment maker ASML ASML-Q , shares of which rose 1 “The ADR listing should not materially change our view on SK Hynix or the memory sector,” said Gary Tan, a Singapore-based portfolio manager at Allspring Global Investments “The headline capital raise appears large but implies only limited dilution and remains modest relative to its mid-term capex plans. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: SK Hynix targets $38b US listing as AI demand surges
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix targets $38b US listing as AI demand surges'이다. The world’s second-largest memory chipmaker plans to issue up to 17. 79 million new shares. Riding the AI boom, SK Hynix's shares quadrupled AI generated SEOUL – South Korea’s SK Hynix said on June 24 it plans to raise up to US$29 Access to US investors “The most attractive benefit for investors is that SK Hynix will trade on Nasdaq alongside rival Micron, giving the company an opportunity to be re-rated in the US market,” said Ryu Young-ho, a senior analyst at NH Investment & Securities Capacity expansion SK Hynix said the proceeds from the listing of American Depositary Receipts will be used to build chip factories in South Korea and purchase chip making equipment such as an extreme ultraviolet scanner made by Dutch equipment maker ASML, shares of which rose 1 “The ADR listing should not materially change our view on SK Hynix or the memory sector,” said Gary Tan, a Singapore-based portfolio manager at Allspring Global Investments. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10'이다. The company plans to issue 17. 79 million new shares at a value of 45. 45 trillion won ($29. 65 billion). SK Hynix said it expects to start trading on July 10, but added that the dates were tentative and subject to change " "We expect to elevate our status as a global company by broadening our touchpoints in the United States, the epicenter of AI technological innovation," SK Hynix said in the filing SK Hynix holds about 60% of the HBM market share, according to Counterpoint research director MS Hwang Shares in SK Hynix have soared over 280% this year, propelling its market capitalization above $1 trillion as investors piled into companies seen as key beneficiaries of the global scramble for HBM chips Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix together account for more than 40% of South Korea's benchmark Kospi , raising concerns that the market could become more exposed to risks, including supply chain disruptions and a slowdown in global data center investment. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Hyundai Motor's South Korean union approves strike action over stalled wage talks
matched_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Hyundai Motor's South Korean union approves strike action over stalled wage talks'이다. Hyundai Motor's South Korean union members have voted to authorize a strike, signaling potential production halts. This action stems from unresolved wage talks, with the union demanding a significant base pay increase and a substantial performance bonus. They are also seeking assurances on employment and working conditions concerning AI integration, mirroring recent profit-sharing moves by other major tech firms. Union representatives had pledged to discuss strike plans if an agreement was not reached during government-mediated ⁠talks on Wednesday, ‌a union spokesperson said. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: How SK Hynix's bet on a niche memory chip made it more valuable than Samsung
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'How SK Hynix's bet on a niche memory chip made it more valuable than Samsung'이다. SK Hynix has risen to claim the title of South Korea's most valuable company, a testament to its visionary 14-year investment in high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips. Initially viewed with doubt, this strategic pivot to a niche segment, particularly serving Nvidia's AI accelerators, has firmly established SK Hynix as a leader within the booming global AI landscape, outpacing competitor Samsung Electronics. Initially viewed with doubt, this strategic pivot to a niche segment, particularly serving Nvidia's AI accelerators, has firmly established SK Hynix as a leader within the booming global AI landscape, outpacing competitor Samsung Electronics Hyun Sun-yeop, a former SK Hynix HR executive, said its underdog ‌status made it work harder Its in-house foundry business supplies key components for HBM chips, while SK Hynix relies on Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing to produce the so-called base die using less advanced technology SK Hynix's fortunes helped power South Korea's economy, its stock market and made its employees attractive marriage material In 2024, Chey, the SK Group chair, said SK Hynix should seek a market capitalization of 1 quadrillion won and eventually raise that to 2 quadrillion won, according to a book, Super Momentum. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: KOSPI bounces back as Asian markets look to recover from rout
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'KOSPI bounces back as Asian markets look to recover from rout'이다. Investors tentatively got back on the horse in Seoul as they picked up the pieces following a 10 per cent collapse in the KOSPI on Tuesday, which was led by 12 per cent losses in chip giants and market heavyweights SK Hynix and Samsung. Investors tentatively got back on the horse in Seoul as they picked up the pieces following a 10 per cent collapse in the KOSPI on Tuesday, which was led by 12 per cent losses in chip giants and market heavyweights SK Hynix and Samsung While no specific catalyst was blamed for the selling, analysts said it illustrated the growing concern on trading floors about the extended valuations of tech firms, which have been the key driver of a rally to record highs in several markets globally 84 per cent, following a media rout that the chipmaker plans a share buyback programme worth about 90 trillion won (US$58 Peer SK Hynix gained 0 Memory remains one of the critical bottlenecks in the global AI buildout, and neither SK hynix nor Samsung suddenly lost their strategic importance because the market had one violent session. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.company_summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'KOSPI bounces back as Asian markets look to recover from rout'이다. Investors tentatively got back on the horse in Seoul as they picked up the pieces following a 10 per cent collapse in the KOSPI on Tuesday, which was led by 12 per cent losses in chip giants and market heavyweights SK Hynix and Samsung. Investors tentatively got back on the horse in Seoul as they picked up the pieces following a 10 per cent collapse in the KOSPI on Tuesday, which was led by 12 per cent losses in chip giants and market heavyweights SK Hynix and Samsung While no specific catalyst was blamed for the selling, analysts said it illustrated the growing concern on trading floors about the extended valuations of tech firms, which have been the key driver of a rally to record highs in several markets globally 84 per cent, following a media rout that the chipmaker plans a share buyback programme worth about 90 trillion won (US$58 Peer SK Hynix gained 0 Memory remains one of the critical bottlenecks in the global AI buildout, and neither SK hynix nor Samsung suddenly lost their strategic importance because the market had one violent session. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
